description_long: This is a wooden bed frame with a light, natural finish, featuring a slatted headboard and footboard. The frame is rectangular and supported by four sturdy legs, with open slats on both the headboard and footboard providing a classic, airy look. The side rails are solid, and the bed platform consists of three wide wooden planks with visible gaps between them. There is no mattress or bedding present, leaving the wooden platform exposed. The overall design is simple and functional, suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban environments. The construction appears robust, with all visible components made from the same light-colored wood.
description: A light wood bed frame with slatted headboard and footboard, featuring a simple, sturdy design and an exposed wooden platform.
description_view_0: Front view showing the slatted footboard and the solid side rails, with the headboard visible in the background.
description_view_1: Side angle revealing the open slats of the headboard and footboard, and the three wide wooden planks forming the platform.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the slatted headboard and the full length of the bed frame, with the footboard in the foreground.
description_view_3: Opposite side angle showing the slatted design and the exposed wooden platform, similar to view 1 but from the other side.
